claims.text: Lead Software Engineer with 19+ years building and shipping production web systems, with deep hands-on full-stack expertise in PHP and Laravel.
claims.reframing_note: Reframed from the candidate's AI/Drupal-forward headline to foreground the Lead Software Engineer title, 19+ years of tenure, and PHP/Laravel full-stack expertise most relevant to a Lead Backend PHP Engineer (Laravel) role; no new facts added, only emphasis shifted away from the AI/Azure framing.

claims.text: 19+ years of professional software engineering experience.
Currently leads a 20-person engineering team within a 47-member delivery organization, aligning with the role's Lead seniority level.
claims.reframing_note: Quantified reframe positioning team-scale leadership against the offer's 'lead' seniority; the 20-person/47-member figures are quoted verbatim from the summary field.

claims.text: Developed and maintained Laravel-based REST API services for enterprise clients, applying OOP/MVC principles, PSR coding standards, and Eloquent ORM; integrated 10+ third-party APIs (payment gateways, CRMs, data feeds) to deliver clean, testable back-end code at production scale.

Established CI/CD pipelines via Travis CI and GitHub Actions; standardized local development with Docksal and containerization with Docker Compose, reducing environment drift and onboarding time across the delivery team.

Owned deployment pipelines and Drupal/PHP application update cycles across multi-site environments, achieving zero-downtime releases and reducing environment-related regression incidents by ~30% through CI/CD tooling and Capistrano automation.

Implemented and maintained REST and SOAP integrations connecting CMS platforms with third-party services (payment gateways, CRMs, data feeds) across up to 5 concurrent client projects, improving data reliability and eliminating manual synchronization overhead.
Introduced PHPUnit test coverage and PHP Code Sniffer enforcement in delivery squads, raising core-module unit test coverage to 80%+ and reducing regression incidents across release cycles.

Leading development of a Drupal 8-11 multi-site platform for Otsuka (multinational healthcare company), managing a 20-person dev team within a 47-member delivery team; accountable for architecture decisions, release quality, and cross-team coordination.

Collaborated in agile (Scrum/Kanban) delivery squads, reviewing PRs for a team of 6+ engineers per project, contributing to sprint planning, architectural design discussions, and cross-functional stakeholder communication.

Led full-stack delivery of 50+ web projects across e-commerce, corporate, and media verticals—business-card sites, online stores, corporate portals, and marketing experiences—across PHP, Bitrix, WordPress, OpenCart, and PrestaShop stacks, averaging 8–10 concurrent active client engagements.

Performed proactive security incident response across 10+ compromised client sites: malware removal, vulnerability identification and remediation, and full restoration of production environments, preserving client uptime and data integrity with zero recurrence.

Architected and shipped 20+ CMS modules, plugins, and API integrations, resolving cross-system conflicts and extending platform capabilities for e-commerce and content workflows across SMB client portfolios.
Integrated payment systems, hosting administration, and SEO improvements; collaborated within a 5-person dev team.
Built and maintained PHP-backed e-commerce features, MySQL schemas, and hosting/system reliability for live production properties.
Delivered PHP applications and CMS-driven client sites with emphasis on SEO-ready structure, clean MySQL data modeling, and maintainable code across multiple frameworks.
English proficiency: Upper-Intermediate (B2), meeting the role's required English level.
claims.reframing_note: Emphasis added ('meeting the role's required English level') pairing the candidate's stated B2 proficiency with the offer's English B2 must-have; proficiency level itself is quoted verbatim.

claims.text: Master of Mining (Underground Mining of Mineral Deposits) — Faculty of Mining and Metallurgy; progressed through Bachelor and Specialist degrees.
